title: myrrhidium bullatum
side_effects: Myrrhidium bullatum can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, nausea, and vomiting. Prolonged use can lead to liver damage, kidney problems, and increased heart rate. In severe cases, improper use of myrrhidium bullatum can cause seizures, coma, and even death. Additionally, it may interact with other medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, resulting in adverse health consequences.
